channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Ampeg Little Stud Bass - Japan - Fretless — $300
item.description:
$300 · Good · Occasional Music Gear and More

This is an Ampeg "Little Stud" bass guitar, 34" scale. From what I have been able to determine it's from around 1975, made in Japan. Black body and neck, rosewood fretboard with block inlays and binding. The fretboard has been converted to fretless, but not by pulling the fret wires -- it appears to have been ground down flat. It also appears that the stock pickup has been upgraded to what looks like a Dimarzio Model One or similar. There is a series/parallel switch onboard in addition to the V and T controls. The original bridge was missing a screw and lacked individually adjustable saddles, that's been changed out for a 4 saddle one (original bridge will be included). Truss rod functional, see last pic for original truss cover, also included. Wearing flatwound strings, still in nice shape with lots of life left in them (Rotosound, I believe). Strap buttons compatible with locking systems but can accommodate a regular strap also. See pics for more detail and please contact me with any questions. Thanks for looking!

item.title: 2026 Fender CB-60CE Natural Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar 4 String — $369.99
item.description:
$369.99 · Excellent · Magdon Music of Northeastern PA

Like Magdon Music on FB!


For your review and consideration - we present you with another fine Fender Guitar from the guitar collection at Magdon Music!


Please read the description below and review the photos. The exact bass guitar pictured and in the description is the exact bass that you will be purchasing. If there is something that you need to know that is not in this description - please message us before purchasing and we will be very happy to assist! 


*** Please note that our guitars are tech inspected before they go out the door! Buy with confidence from Magdon Music!


***Shipping is for the Continental USA (lower 48 only!) Magdon Music reserves the right to ship FedEx, UPS, or USPS- depending on your ship address/ship rates.

***Please note that our Guitars can not be shipped to destinations outside of the USA!


🎸 Just in to Magdon Music: a Fender CB-60SCE Acoustic-Electric Bass - Natural Finish! Pictured here is a new Fender CB-60SCE Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar, Open Box! These warm & portable bass guitars feel incredible, look classy, and can groove out a tune like nobody's business! These are incredible for camping, acoustic sets, getting unique tones, or just having something to pick up and play! This is a new, open box CB-60SCE - very clean! These acoustic basses are some of the best in their class - and, at this pricepoint, they are irresistible! Order Today! The Classic Design series rounds out with the CB-60SCE, an acoustic bass that goes above and beyond anything in its class. This model makes use of the same slim-taper, easy-to-play neck profile found on all Classic Design guitars. Its solid spruce top and mahogany back and sides complement the concert-sized body for a smooth and articulate low end. The perfect companion for an 'unplugged' session, the CB-60SCE comes equipped with a flexible Fishman® electronics system that's well-suited to the stage or studio.Features & Specs:

  • Concert Bass body shape
  • Solid spruce top with scalloped "X"-bracing
  • Mahogany back and sides
  • Easy-to-play neck with rolled fingerboard edges
  • Fishman® Classic Design pickup/preamp

Neck Material Mahogany Neck Finish Gloss Urethane Neck Shape Fender® 'Easy-to-Play' shape with

               rolled fretboard edges Finger board Radius     12" (305 mm)Fingerboard Material      Walnut Position Inlays3mm Pearloid Dot Number of Frets22Truss Rod Dual-Action String Nut Plastic Nut Width1.69" (43 mm)Nut Material Plastic Fret Size Vintage-Style Scale Length32" (813 mm)

Body Solid Spruce Top with Laminated Mahogany Back and Sides Body Finish Gloss Body Shape Concert Body Top Solid Spruce Body Binding Multiple Body Back Laminated Mahogany Body Sides Laminated Mahogany Body Material Solid Spruce Top with Laminated Mahogany Back and Sides Cutaway Yes Bracing Scalloped X Rosette CD Series Pearloid Bridge Walnut Bridge Pins Black with White DotsPickguard1-Ply Black Hardware Finish Chrome Tuning Machines Chrome Die-Cast Controls Volume, Bass, Middle, Treble Special Electronics Fishman® CD Preamp Serial Number

IWA2460982📦 What's Included:

  • Fender CB-60SCE Acoustic-Electric Bass in Natural Finish (S/N IWA2460982)
    • 🩺 Condition:

    New, Open Box! Please note: This guitar is currently on display in our spectacular showroom, and may experience some light demo play under the careful supervision of our attentive staff. 


    ***All Shipping is for USA ONLY! (Lower 48 only!)


    (SC.28M22.SO)CB60.CLVN

    ***Returns Accepted.

     ****Buyer pays two way shipping. 

    *****A 10% Restock Fee May Apply.


    If there is anything else that you need to know about this guitar or if you would like an in-hand description or more photos- please feel free to message our professional guitar department at Magdon Music.


    ***Please note that Magdon Music has showrooms full of guitars- both new and used. Not all of them are listed online.  If you are looking for something specific and do not see it online- please feel free to message us and we'll be glad to help!


    Magdon Music Voted: "Best Music Store 2025 &  2024 & 2023 & 2022" by"Times Tribune Reader's Choice Poll"
    Magdon Music Voted: "Best Music Store 2021" by"Times Tribune Reader's Choice Poll"
    Magdon Music Voted: "Best Music Store 2020" by"Times Tribune Reader's Choice Poll""The Valley Advantage Reader's Poll"&"The Electric City's Best of the Best Poll"

item.title: This item is used, and therefore may show some signs of wear, such as scuffs and scratches. However, these flaws are purely cosmetic and do not affect functionality whatsoever. — $125
item.description:
$125 · Good · Hollywood Pawn Shop Jewelry

For sale, we have a Dean Vendetta Electric Guitar (China).

This item is used, and therefore may show some signs of wear, such as scuffs and scratches. However, these flaws are purely cosmetic and do not affect functionality whatsoever.

This item has been fully tested and is found to be 100% functional. Please see photos for cosmetic condition. All photos are of the actual item you will receive.
Tech Specs:
Model: Dean Vendetta Electric Guitar

 Serial number: Y13030532

Made: China

Color: Brown

item.title: Fender Precision Bass (Standard P-Bass) wiring harness with 0.047uF Bumblebee oil filled capacitor — $65
item.description:
$65 · Excellent · Teddy's Tone Shop

This is a premium wiring harness for a standard Fender Precision Bass (P-Bass).


- (2) CTS 250k solid short shaft audio taper potentiometers

- Centralab Bumblebee 0.047uF oil filled capacitor (Difficult to locate these)

- Switchcraft 1/4" input jack

- Gavitt 22wag vintage cloth push back wire for all potentiometer, input jack, and ground connections


* Wiring diagram included.

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass, Laurel Fingerboard, Black — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · Wolf Music Company

Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender® Standard Precision Bass® delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a Fender Standard pickup for versatile iconic tone and an inviting “Modern C”-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this P Bass® truly sets the standard for the Fender experience.

  • Poplar body with gloss finish
  • Fender Standard ceramic split single-coil P Bass pickup
  • 4-saddle bridge with satin chrome saddles
  • “Modern C”-shaped maple neck with satin finish
  • 9.5"-radius fingerboard



Features

  • Poplar body with gloss finish
  • Fender Standard ceramic split single-coil P Bass pickup
  • 4-saddle bridge with satin chrome saddles
  • “Modern C”-shaped maple neck with satin finish
  • 9.5"-radius fingerboard

item.title: Pedulla Pentabuzz 2003 — $4,175.89
item.description:
$4,175.89 · Excellent · AVB

All original Pedulla pentabuzz fretless. Made in 2003, AA top, 19mm spacing. Some dings here and there, all in all 9/10.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Control Plate, CTS Pots — $250
item.description:
$250 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Control Plate, CTS Pots, and 2 grounding plates. CTS labelled pots have date codes of 1973. All original. Pots work like they should, original switchcraft jack. Some tarnishing, scratches and wear, but in very good condition, especially for a 53 year old part. Perfect for restoring your vintage bass, or project. The pictures show the condition. Will be packed well, fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BRFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 STATES ONLY, NO OVERSEAS

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Special 1988 - Candy Apple Red — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Good · ProSound

Selling a Power Jazz Bass Special. The bass has a couple cosmetic blemishes that are pictured. It sounds great, plays great, and has had the potentiometers freshly cleaned with a new battery. This was a groundbreaking instrument that featured Fender’s very first onboard active preamp circuit. While named a Jazz Bass, it is actually a hybrid "P/J" bass, pairing a Precision Bass body and neck pickup with a slim Jazz Bass neck and bridge pickup.

The defining trait of the "Power" version is its unique Active Tone Enhancement (A.T.E.) circuit, powered by a single 9-volt battery. Unlike modern active basses that use standard 2-band or 3-band EQs, the 1980s Power Special uses a multi-tiered filtering system managed by a 3-way mini-toggle switch:

* Mode 1: Passive – The preamp is bypassed. The tone knob operates like a traditional, vintage Fender tone control.

* Mode 2: Low Frequency Boost – Engages the active circuit to inject a deep, thumping bottom-end "pop" ideal for slap bass, funk, and reggae.

* Mode 3: Midrange Frequency Boost – Shifts the active circuit to emphasize punchy mids and high-end "brilliance," allowing the bass to easily cut through heavy rock mixes.

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass with Pau Ferro Fretboard 2017 - Lake Placid Blue — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · William's Gear Outlet

Fender P Bass excellent condition. Very nice bass guitar

item.title: 1973 Fender Jazz USA Vintage Bass Body — $500
item.description:
$500 · Fair · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender Jazz USA Vintage Bass Body In fair condition. This was stripped before I received it, and seems to have been repainted red previously. It is the real deal 4 bolt body multi-piece Ash body. You can see all the correct holes, and some of the red paint in the neck pocket. Still some red in the grain seen also. This is more of a project, and the pictures show the condition. This is just for the body, no hardware included, and sold as is, but as described. It will be packed well, fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING, OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 STATES ONLY, NO OVERSEAS

item.title: Sire 2nd Generation Marcus Miller V7 LPB Ash 4-String with Maple Fingerboard 2019 - Lake Placid Blue — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Dj's gear

Amazing Sire Marcus Miller jazz bass in Pristine shape! Active/passive preamp. Butter smooth neck. Punchy, low end thumping pickups. This thing is so great. Just thinning out the herd. I’m asking 650 OBO. I’ll throw in a gig bag. No low ball offers. Be fair with what you offer and I’ll work with you. Happy to answer any questions , Thank you!

A full price offer - I will send it in a hard case Instead of the gig bag.

item.title: 2018 Fender Flea Signature Active Jazz Bass Shell Pink #US18091032 — $2,179
item.description:
$2,179 · Excellent · Thunder Road Guitars PDX

If you're reading this, you probably already know what you're looking at! One of two Flea signature models released through Fender, this version is active and features a custom body with a smooth satin urethane finish, an Aguilar OBP-1 18V preamp, and a custom neck plate engraving designed by Flea.

Freshly inspected and set up in-house by our esteemed Guitar Tech. In Excellent condition with minor wear for an instrument of this age, including light scratches and other signs of normal handling and use. See below for more details and specifications.

FROM FENDER:

It takes a bass of unusual power to keep up with Red Hot Chili Peppers' bassist Flea's hyperkinetic playing style - a bass like the thunderous Flea Signature Active Jazz Bass®. Sporting a custom-shaped Jazz Bass body and a hot Fender humbucking pickup mated to an Aguilar OBP-1 18-volt preamp, this bass cranks out massive output, perfect for pounding a stadium with the power of funk.

_______________________________________________________________

SPECIFICATIONS:

Nickel Hardware

Matching Painted Headstock with Modern Fender Tuners

1 5/8” Bone Nut 

Quarter Sawn Maple Neck with 34” Scale Length

Neck Thickness .80" at First Fret and .98" at Twelfth Fret

Maple Fingerboard with Dot Inlays and 12" - 16" Compound Radius

Custom Neck Plate with Engraved Logo Designed by Flea

22 Medium Frets in Excellent Condition

Fender Tim Shaw Custom Humbucking Pickup with Aguilar 18V Preamp

Fender Hi-Mass Bridge

Alder Body in Satin Shell Pink Finish

Weight 9 lb 0 oz

Original Hard Shell Case

Serial Number US18091032

__________________________________________________________________

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings. Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so. We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument. Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing.  

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear. If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us to ask any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

item.title: Squier Jazz — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Jim's Gear Locker

Bass is hand painted, as well as blocks on neck. Professionally set up w/ Roto Sound flat wound strings. It a nice sounding bass for an Affinty Squier. Head decal was sanded off, I think that the painter intended to paint that too. Has belt rash on back as shown in photos. Serial number CY06063919, made in china. No case nor gigbag. Sold as is.

item.title: Fender P-Bass 1963 - White — $9,500
item.description:
$9,500 · Very Good · Brian's Stuff

1963 Fender Precision Bass – Glen Quan Private Collection – Pre-CBS – $9,500 OBO
This is a rare opportunity to own a piece of Bay Area music history.
This 1963 Fender Precision Bass (with a 1960 neck) was part of the private collection of Glen Quan — legendary Bay Area luthier, musician, and the man who designed and invented the Badass Bass Bridge. It was purchased directly from his estate through Bananas at Large in San Rafael, one of the most respected vintage instrument dealers in Northern California.
The bass features a Badass Bridge — installed by the man who invented it — making this the only bass in the world that can claim that distinction.
Specs:

1963 Fender Precision Bass body — Olympic White
1960 P-Bass neck — rosewood fingerboard
Badass Bass Bridge (the inventor's own bass)
Aftermarket pickups
Tortoiseshell pickguard
Pre-CBS construction

Condition: Heavy honest player wear consistent with a working musician's instrument. This bass has been played and loved. All wear is authentic — no repairs, no cracks, fully functional.
Provenance: Purchased directly from the Glen Quan Estate through Bananas at Large, San Rafael, CA.
Pre-CBS Fenders don't come with stories like this one. Serious inquiries only — no trades, no lowballers.
$9,500 OBO

item.title: Warwick Corvette Standard 2005 - Natural Oil Finish — $1,376.18
item.description:
$1,376.18 · Excellent · Gear Obsessed

A beautiful and great sounding bass. Bubinga body, Ovangol neck, and a Wenge fretboard with brass frets. There is no noticeable fret wear at all. This is what is now considered the german made "Pro" line from Warwick.

This model has passive electronics but can be easily upgraded to active electronics if that's something you are interested in.

Includes a hardshell case.

item.title: Ibanez PCB54E Performance Series Acoustic Bass Guitar, Open Pore Natural — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Brand New · Sims Music

Ibanez's guiding philosophy for acoustics is, "a modern approach to acoustic guitar tradition." This philosophy naturally extends quite well to the acoustic bass collection. With tone, style, playability at incredible value, Ibanez acoustic basses are creatively inspiring instruments designed to thrive in a wide variety of musical situations.

Specifications

  • Bridge: Nandu Wood bridge
  • Fretboard: Nandu Wood fretboard
  • Top/Back/Body: Meranti top / Meranti back & Meranti sides
  • Neck Type: PBC / Meranti neck

item.title: Fender Boxer Series PJ Bass - Rosewood Fingerboard, Torino Red — $999.99
item.description:
$999.99 · Very Good · Alto Music

Gig Bag Included | Guitar Weighs 8.5 lbs

Please note – this item is pre-owned and may show signs of use. See listing for actual photos of the bass guitar The Made in Japan Boxer® Series recreates a classic Fender collection from the late '80s. Designed for high-performance players, each Boxer Series instrument comes equipped with high-output pickups, speedy necks and advanced electronics. The Boxer® Precision Bass® combines a high output P-Bass® split-coil pickup with a hot Jazz Bass® single-coil pickup, independent volume controls and a TBX™ tone control for super-flexible sonic options perfect for nearly any playing style. These basses feature a Medium "C"-shaped maple neck with a 12" radius rosewood fingerboard and 20 jumbo frets for comfortable, modern playability.

item.description:
$2,100 · Excellent · Wes's Shop

Mint Condition!! Less than one hour of play time on this perfect bass. Moved to a smaller studio and simply don't have enough room for some of my collection...

item.title: Harmony H65N 1976-1981 - Natural — $594.36
item.description:
$594.36 · Good · James's Gear Outlet

Harmony H65N Vintage MIJ Precision-Style Bass – Natural Finish w/EMG Pickups & Padded Gig Bag

Vintage Harmony H65N electric bass in natural finish. These Japanese-made Harmony basses have earned a reputation as solid, well-built Precision-style instruments with excellent sustain and a full, punchy tone. This example has the substantial feel many players appreciate, weighing 11 lbs. 7 oz.

This bass has been thoughtfully upgraded with EMG pickups, providing improved clarity, output, and a powerful, modern tone while retaining the solid feel and vintage character of the instrument. It has also been fitted with a replacement bridge and replacement machine heads for improved performance. The tuner replacement has left a few minor screw holes visible on the back of the headstock from the original hardware installation, as shown in the photos.

The original pickguard has been covered with a rose-pattern wrap, giving the instrument a unique appearance while preserving the original guard underneath.

Overall, this is a great-playing vintage bass that blends classic late-1970s Japanese craftsmanship with modern upgrades. It’s equally at home on stage, in the studio, or in the hands of a collector looking for a unique vintage instrument.

Features

  • Late 1970s Harmony H65N bass
  • Made in Japan
  • Natural finish
  • Upgraded EMG pickups
  • Replacement bridge
  • Replacement machine heads
  • Weight: 11 lbs. 7 oz.
  • Minor visible screw holes on the back of the headstock from tuner replacement
  • Original pickguard with rose-pattern wrap installed over top
  • Includes padded Profile soft gig bag (may not be the exact bag shown in the photos)

Ships securely packed in the padded gig bag with additional protective packaging. Shipping is available throughout Canada and the USA. Buyer is responsible for shipping costs, duties, taxes, and any applicable import fees. Please contact me with your postal code or ZIP code for an accurate shipping quote.

item.title: 2006 Fender Jazz Bass Fretless White Made in Mexico #MZ6190870 — $549
item.description:
$549 · Good · Thunder Road Guitars PDX

The same Fender Jazz Bass we all love, just without the frets! Whether you're adding a workhorse to your fretless bass collection or looking to expand the possibilities of your playing for the first time, this is a great option at an accessible price. 

Freshly inspected and set up in-house by our esteemed Guitar Tech. In Good condition with moderate wear for an instrument of this age, including one large chip in the finish at the base of the neck, some light scratches, and other signs of normal handling and use. See below for more details and specifications.

___________________________________________________________

SPECIFICATIONS:

Modern Open-Gear Tuners

1.5” Synthetic Nut 

Maple Neck with 34” Scale Length

Neck Thickness .80" at First Fret and .94" at Twelfth Fret

Rosewood Fingerboard with 7.25" Radius

20 Fret Lines

2 Single Coil Pickups

4-Saddle Top-Loading Bridge

Alder Body in Vintage White Finish

Weight 9 lb 5 oz

Road Runner Gig Bag

Serial Number MZ6190870

___________________________________________________________

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings. Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so. We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument. Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing.  

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear. If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us to ask any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

  • 34" Scale length 
  • String Through Body

  • C-shaped neck

This bass is in really good shape, it plays and sounds fantastic.

item.title: Fender 60th Anniversary Jazz Bass with Matching Headstock — $2,495
item.description:
$2,495 · Excellent · Brian's Stuff

Fender 60th Anniversary Jazz Bass – Metallic White – USA – Complete Collector's Package

Price: $2,495

Description

For sale is my 2020 Fender 60th Anniversary American Jazz Bass in the beautiful Pearl White finish. This bass has been well cared for, professionally maintained, and is in excellent condition.

It has been played and gigged, but never abused. There is one small cosmetic ding on the back of the neck heel that does not affect playability in any way. Otherwise, the bass is exceptionally clean.

This bass is currently fitted with a custom American Flag pickguard, a matching American Flag guitar strap, and a clear plexiglass thumb ramp mounted between the pickups for improved playing comfort and speed. The ramp can be easily removed if desired.

Also included is the original factory pickguard, allowing the bass to be returned to its original appearance at any time.

Included

  • Original Fender hard shell case
  • Certificate of Authenticity
  • Original paperwork and hang tags
  • Original Fender instrument cable (still factory sealed)
  • Original truss rod adjustment wrench
  • Original chrome bridge cover
  • Original chrome pickup cover
  • Original mounting screws
  • Original factory pickguard
  • Custom American Flag pickguard (currently installed)
  • Matching American Flag strap
  • Clear plexiglass thumb ramp installed between the pickups

The case is in excellent condition and still has the original protective plastic on the handle, reflecting how carefully it has been stored.

The bass plays and sounds exactly as a great American Jazz Bass should—fast, comfortable neck with the classic punch, growl, and articulation that Jazz Basses are known for. Everything functions as it should.

Finding one of these 60th Anniversary American-made Jazz Basses is becoming increasingly difficult, especially one that includes all of the original accessories, documentation, and case candy.

Condition

  • Excellent overall condition
  • One small cosmetic ding on the rear neck heel
  • No cracks or repairs
  • Straight neck
  • Excellent fret life
  • Electronics function perfectly
  • Adult owned
  • Smoke-free home

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description.

Feel free to contact me with any questions or if you'd like additional photos.

Thank you for looking!

item.title: 1970 Fender Precision Bass 3 tone Sunburst — $6,200
item.description:
$6,200 · Very Good · Matt's Gear Garage

This killer 1970 Fender P-Bass is a truly special vintage instrument that stands out from the crowd with its beautifully aged 3-color sunburst finish.

This sweet playing bass sounds absolutely great! The early 70s split-coil Precision pickup has a slightly hotter and punchier tone than its 1960s counterpart, making the instrument equally great for playing with roundwounds or flats, which it is currently strung with. The wear on this bass looks great and only reinforces its iconic image. There are no playability issues to speak of, and the bass is totally original as far as we can tell.

item.title: Fender Flea Jazz Bass - Rosewood Fingerboard, Roadworn Shell Pink — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Excellent · Alto Music

Gig Bag Included | Guitar Weighs 8.8 lbs

Please note – this item is pre-owned and may show signs of use. See listing for actual photos of the bass guitar Flea's funk- and jazz-influenced basslines helped propel the Red Hot Chili Peppers to the top of the rock and alternative charts while redefining the role of bass in the modern era. Flea's unique playing style brought a welcome breath of fresh air to the musical landscape of the past four decades, inspiring countless bassists to add a funky touch to their sound while exploring new techniques and harmonic possibilities. To celebrate his enduring influence, Fender has recreated his prized Shell Pink '61 Jazz Bass that he received from a fan and used to record the Peppers' Stadium Arcadium and The Getaway, as well as with the supergroup, Atoms For Peace. A pair of vintage-style, American-made Pure Vintage '64 Jazz Bass single-coil pickups provides classic, original-era Fender tone with clear articulation, clear low end definition, up-front midrange punch and singing high end. The vintage-accurate stacked concentric controls shape the pickups' volume and tone, as well as allowing the pickups to be blended in any ratio. The Flea Jazz Bass plays fast and easy, thanks to its period-accurate 20-fret "C"-shaped maple neck with a smooth Road Worn® nitrocellulose lacquer finish on the back, plus a 7.25"-radius rosewood fingerboard with a 1.5" wide nut. The vintage-style bridge sports four threaded steel "barrel" saddles, adding a touch of crispness to enhance the attack fo

item.title: Sadowsky Metroline Vintage PJ - Sunburst — $2,970.85
item.description:
$2,970.85 · Very Good · Bass Domus

Original bag and documents

item.title: Marleaux Consat Custom — $3,901.47
item.description:
$3,901.47 · Very Good · GAVRIIL KAMPANTAIS


For sale is an original Marleaux Consat Custom 5-string bass, built in 2014.
100% original, no mods.

Specs & Features:

  • German custom shop instrument
  • Original Delano - Marleaux electronics (pickups & preamp)
  • Exotic figured top
  • Extremely comfortable neck and great ergonomics
  • Very low, effortless action
  • Clear, powerful and articulate tone – perfect for studio and live use

Condition:
very good condition. Only minimal signs of normal use


Great bass very light 3,9 kg

34 scale

ebenus fingerboard

Coming with Elixir Nickel and a new Thomman hard case

One of the best basses out there


Open to reasonable offers! Feel free to message for best price.

item.title: Fender Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Mustang Bass - Faded Daphne Blue — $1,399.99
item.description:
$1,399.99 · Excellent · Alto Music

Gig Bag Included | Guitar Weighs 7.7 lbs

Please note – this item is pre-owned and may show signs of use. See listing for actual photos of the guitar Known as a true renaissance man of the modern music scene, Justin Meldal-Johnsen's bass credits include Beck, Nine Inch Nails and more. His production credits include Jimmy Eat World, Paramore and M83, among others. JMJ is a shining example of today's breed of multi-genre musician/producers, ever pushing boundaries and inspiring others. From studio to stage, Justin's treasured '66 Mustang Bass is his tool of choice. Fender teamed up with him to create a signature 4-string modeled after his vintage Daphne Blue instrument - the Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Mustang Bass. Powered by a custom-spec split-coil pickup, the JMJ Road Worn Mustang bass is perfect for laying down punchy basslines with plenty of Fender mojo. The 30" scale gives it a tight, focused tone while the modern 9.5"-radius fingerboard with rolled edges offers a familiar feel that will make any bassist feel right at home.Designed for comfort and speed, this bass also has stage-ready style. From the nicks and picks scratches on the body to the worn-in feel of the neck to the aged hardware, this bass shows the marks of an instrument that has earned its stripes out on the road. Check out the unique tone and amazing feel of the Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Mustang Bass.

item.title: 2003 Pedulla MVP5 Fretless Pentabuzz w/Original Case and Wrench — $5,399.99
item.description:
$5,399.99 · Excellent · South Shore Music & DiCenso's Drum Shop

9 lbs., 12 oz.  Very clean with just a couple dings.

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco Bass - Arctic White w/Maple — $259.99
item.description:
$259.99 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Squier:

"The Squier Sonic™ Bronco® Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Bronco Bass sports a slim and inviting “C”-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier® single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a short 30" scale length, 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight."

Arctic White, Crafted in Indonesia, Gloss polyurethane body finish, Poplar body, C shaped Maple neck with a 9.5″ radius Maple fingerboard and narrow tall frets, 30" scale length, 1.5" nut width, Ceramic single coil pickup with the master volume and tone controls, Standard bridge with the barrel steel saddles, Cast/sealed tuners, 7.8 pounds, Case not included

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass - Olympic White w/Maple — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Fender:

"Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender® Standard Precision Bass® delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a Fender Standard pickup for versatile iconic tone and an inviting “Modern C”-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this P Bass® truly sets the standard for the Fender experience."

Olympic White, Made in Indonesia, Gloss polyester body finish, Poplar body, Modern C shaped Maple neck with a 9.5" radius Maple fingerboard and medium jumbo frets, 34" scale length, 1.625" nut width, Standard ceramic split single coil Precision Bass pickup with the master volume and tone controls, Standard top load bridge with the satin chrome barrel steel saddles, Standard open gear tuners, 8.0 pounds, Case not included

item.title: Epiphone Newport Bass - Sunset Yellow — $449
item.description:
$449 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Epiphone:

"The Epiphone Newport Bass is an all-original design that debuted in 1961. The modern Newport Bass pays tribute to that rare vintage model while offering refinements to meet the needs of today’s bassists. The 30.5” scale length and comfortable Medium C profile make it suitable for players with a wide range of hand sizes, while the symmetrical double-cutaway body ensures excellent access to every fret. The Bass Sidewinder neck pickup provides rich, deep tones, while the TB PRO in the bridge position delivers brighter timbres. The two pickups are paired with master volume and tone controls and a blend knob so you can get precisely the tonal balance you desire."

Brand New, Sunset Yellow, Gloss Finish, Mahogany Body, Medium C Shaped Mahogany Neck, 12" Radius Laurel Fingerboard with the Pearloid Dot Inlays and Medium Jumbo Frets, 30.5" Scale Length, 1.63" Nut Width, Epiphone TB PRO Bridge and Bass Sidewinder Neck Pickups with the Master Volume/Pickup Blend and Master Tone Controls, Historic Tune-O-Matic Bass Bridge/Tailpiece and Cast/Sealed Tuners, 7.3 Pounds, No Case or Gig Bag Included.

item.title: Ibanez RD300 Bass Guitar — $180
item.description:
$180 · Good · Union Music

Ibanez RD300 Roadgear Series electric bass guitar in good used condition. Fully functional and structurally sound, this mid 2000s bass shows honest signs of use, including visible scratches, minor surface dings, and typical finish wear from regular play across the body, though nothing that affects its solid playability or structural integrity.


This model features a sculpted agathis body paired with a comfortable bolt on maple neck and a 24 fret rosewood fingerboard. It comes equipped with a highly versatile passive pickup configuration, a traditional J style single coil at the neck for crisp clarity and a modern high output humbucker at the bridge for fat punchy power. Managed by a global volume control, a pickup balancer knob, and a global tone control, this setup offers an expansive array of thick articulate low end tones that easily cut through any mix.


A dependable road ready player bass with a great broken in feel, perfect for gigging musicians looking for a solid workhorse instrument with excellent sonic flexibility.

item.title: Fender Jazz 1982/1983 - Fiesta Red — $6,200
item.description:
$6,200 · Very Good · Jonathan's Bass and Milkshake Emporium.

1982/83 (neck stamped 1983) Fender Jazz Bass, Fiesta Red. Hails from the much sought after Fullerton production facility. Incredibly rare original color. Only selling because in America you have to do things like this to pay for healthcare (even with insurance which I’m grateful for.) Beat cancer, (yay!) but its cost, is your gain.


Comes with original tweed case and all the case candy- strap was opened/used in an emergency situation but is in great shape. Also includes a bonus white pick guard.

Entered as “very good” instead of excellent because it has been played, there are a few surface chips (pictured) which were on the bass when I acquired it, but for an instrument of its age and quality, it is, in fact, “most excellent.” (Say that like Bill and Ted.)


I am located in southeastern NC- would really prefer not to ship, will gladly deliver/meet half way but if shipping is required that cost will be added.

Toss me an offer, I’m a reasonable fellow.

item.title: Harley Benton Enhanced MJ-5MN Natural — $311.94
item.description:
$311.94 · Brand New · E-Musicstore Strumenti Musicali Forli'

Basso elettrico a 5 corde

  • Forma del corpo: JB-Style

  • Corpo: frassino di palude, forma ergonomica

  • Paletta in tinta

  • Manico avvitato (a 6 viti): acero canadese hard rock

  • Tastiera: acero canadese hard rock

  • Inlays: neri a blocchi

  • Profilo del manico: Modern "C"

  • Raggio della tastiera: 350 mm

  • Lunghezza della scala: 864 mm

  • Larghezza del capotasto: 46 mm

  • Capotasto: TUSQ XL nero

  • 22 tasti: Medium Blacksmith in acciaio inossidabile

  • Pick-up: humbucker Roswell MFR5-B Ferrite (ponte) e single coil Roswell JM5-N Ferrite (centro)

  • EQ a 2 bande Roswell GMA2-CT attivo/passivo

  • Controllo del volume con funzione Push/Pull

  • Controlli balance, alti e bassi

  • Interruttore split: humbucker/single coil

  • Battipenna a 3 strati: nero/bianco/nero

  • Ponte: WSC SK5

  • Hardware: cromato

  • Meccaniche: WSC JB45

  • Corde installate: .045 - .130

  • Colore: naturale opaco

item.title: Ibanez SR1350B SR Premium Electric Bass - Dual Mocha Burst Flat — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Excellent · Alto Music

Gig Bag Included | Guitar Weighs 8.3 lbs

Please note – this item is pre-owned and may show signs of use. See listing for actual photos of the bass guitar For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics. ”Designed to Inspire”, all Ibanez Premium series are manufactured with select tone woods, high-profile electronics, hardware and dedicated skills of craftsmanship and care in details for your musical journey. The richness of sound, stunning appearance and unrivalled playability of the Ibanez Premium series will open the gate of your reservoir of inspiration. Atlas 5pc Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck with KTS™ TITANIUM rods The Atlas 5pc Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck provides a well-balanced note attack and tone with rich sustain.The neck is constructed with KTS™ TITANIUM reinforcement rods, increasing its stability and adding sustain. Panga Panga fretboard Panga Panga features a beautiful wood grain which produces a tight low and mid range, along with a sharp attack on high end. Medium frets with Premium fret edge treatment Medium sized frets enhances the accuracy to your notes. The Premium Fret Edge Treatment offers a super smooth, comfortable performance. Walnut / Panga Panga / Maple top / African Mahogany
